item.text: I’m checking the complete diff with a streaming count and marker scan.

item.command: /bin/zsh -lc "git diff --no-ext-diff --no-color HEAD | awk 'BEGIN {a=0; d=0; m=0} /"'^'"\\+\\+\\+ / {next} /"'^--- / {next} /''^'"\\+/ {a++; if (index(substr("'$0,2), "FIXED-06000")) m=1; next} /''^-/ {d++; next} END {printf "added=%d removed=%d marker=%d'"\\n\", a, d, m}'"
